name: AGM & Committee Meeting
description: Annual General Meeting or committee meeting setting for governance campaigns
briefInstructions: Commission a professional governance meeting background artwork. The environment is a housing society AGM hall or committee meeting room: rows of chairs with residents seated, a projection screen at front (blank or very softly blurred), a committee table with printed agendas, formal but warm lighting, a banner or board showing the society name. Several members are engaged in natural discussion — some seated, one standing at the front. The atmosphere communicates: organized governance, community democracy, professional management. NO software UI on screen, NO readable interfaces, NO laptops open with visible dashboards. The image communicates civic responsibility and organized community leadership. Bottom 30% smooth dark for text.

inputs.label: Event or Campaign Headline
inputs.placeholder: e.g. AGM Season 2025, Annual General Meeting

inputs.label: Supporting Message
inputs.placeholder: e.g. Stay compliant, stay organized with SocietyBee
suggestions: Stay compliant, stay organized with SocietyBee
Manage AGM agendas, minutes, and resolutions digitally
From agenda to minutes — SocietyBee handles it all
